stories.title: Iran's flurry of diplomacy, as Trump insists U.S. has 'the cards'
stories.description: Iran's foreign minister arrived in Russia on Monday, after a whirlwind weekend of diplomacy, seeking to gain political leverage and foreign backing as peace talks with the U.S. remain on hold.

stories.title: How China is responding to the stalling of talks between the U.S. and Iran
stories.description: NPR's Ayesha Rascoe speaks to Zongyuan Zoe Liu, a senior fellow at the Council on Foreign Relations, about how China views the current crisis in the Middle East

stories.title: Trump doubts shooter motivated by Iran war as peace talks on hold
stories.description: A shooting incident at the White House Correspondent's Dinner took focus away from the war in Iran, as Iran's foreign minister planned to return to Islamabad, the site of previous peace talks.

stories.title: Iran's foreign minister leaves Pakistan, then Trump cancels U.S. delegation's travel
stories.description: After arriving on Friday, Iran's Abbas Araghchi has left Islamabad, prompting President Trump to announce that his envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will no longer travel there Saturday for peace talks

stories.title: Israeli strikes kill 14 in Lebanon amid ongoing ceasefire
stories.description: The US announced three days ago that the ceasefire was extended by three weeks after talks.

stories.title: Trump cancels US envoys' trip to Pakistan for talks on Iran war
stories.description: Iran had earlier said there were no plans for a direct meeting with a US delegation led by Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner.

stories.title: Netanyahu orders army to 'vigorously attack' Hezbollah in Lebanon
stories.description: The Israeli PM's directive comes as six people were killed by strikes in Lebanon despite a ceasefire being extended by three weeks.

stories.title: Who is making decisions in Iran?
stories.description: Iran's new supreme leader is supposed to have the final say, but in practice the picture is far murkier.

stories.title: Couple discovers Lebanon home destroyed by Israel from satellite image
stories.description: Joe Elias contacted BBC Verify following reports that his village was among several destroyed by Israeli forces.

stories.title: Trump says Israel-Lebanon ceasefire to be extended by three weeks
stories.description: Envoys from the two countries met in Washington as the fragile truce was due to expire on Sunday.

stories.title: US boards ship carrying Iran oil as Trump threatens mine-laying vessels
stories.description: Central Command said it has intercepted 33 vessels since imposing a blockade on ships coming to and from Iran.

stories.title: US-Kuwaiti journalist held in Kuwait over social media posts acquitted, lawyers say
stories.description: Ahmed Shihab-Eldin reportedly faced charges, including spreading false information, after he re-posted images related to the Iran war.

stories.title: Lebanon accuses Israel of targeting journalist killed in air strike
stories.description: Lebanon's prime minister accused Israel of war crimes after IDF attacks on Red Cross vehicles also stopped rescuers from reaching the site.

stories.title: Iran says Strait of Hormuz cannot be opened due to ceasefire breaches
stories.description: Iran's chief negotiator says "violations" by the US and Israel make it impossible to open the strait.

stories.title: Israel, Hezbollah trade accusations over Lebanon truce violations
stories.description: Lebanon's health ministry said Israeli strikes on the country's south on Sunday killed 14 people, the deadliest day since a ceasefire in the Israel-Hezbollah war came into force over a week ago. It came as Israel and the Iran-backed group traded fresh accusations of breaching the...

stories.title: 'This keeps happening': US press gala shooting latest sign of rising political violence
stories.description: A California man accused of storming a gala dinner attended by President Donald Trump was to appear in court Monday over a shooting that marks at least the third time in three years that Trump has come under threat by an attacker, raising fresh concerns about security, and the gr...

stories.title: Trump's security under scrutiny after shooting
stories.description: U.S. law enforcement officials are reassessing security arrangements after a gunman opened fire near the White House Correspondents' Association dinner, raising questions about how he was able to get so close to an event attended by President Donald Trump, cabinet members and law...

stories.title: Israeli strikes kill 14 in Lebanon despite ceasefire
stories.description: Israeli ​strikes killed 14 people and wounded 37 on Sunday, Lebanon's health ministry said, as the Israeli military warned residents to leave seven towns beyond the "buffer zone" it occupied before a ceasefire that has failed to fully halt hostilities. France 24's correspondent i...

stories.title: King Charles' visit to US goes ahead despite Washington shooting
stories.description: King Charles' state visit to the U.S. will go ahead as planned on ​Monday despite a shooting at a White House dinner attended by President Donald Trump, Buckingham Palace said after discussions with U.S. officials. The four-day trip - which is to include a private meeting with Tr...

stories.title: Middle East war live: Lebanon’s Aoun says will not accept 'humiliating' deal in Israel talks
stories.description: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun said Monday that he will not accept a "humiliating agreement" with Israel, and accused those who drew Lebanon into war of "treason" in an implicit rebuke to Iran-backed Hezbollah. Aoun said his goal was to "reach an end to the state of war" as both ...

stories.title: King Charles III begins US visit despite press gala shooting, transatlantic tensions
stories.description: Britain's King Charles III and Queen Camilla began a four-day visit to the United States on Monday to honour historic ties between the two countries as the US marks its 250th anniversary. The trip will take place despite simmering transatlantic tensions over the Iran war, and a s...

stories.title: Iran’s foreign minister in Russia for talks
stories.description: Iran’s foreign minister in Russia for talks

stories.title: The war on Iran is eroding nuclear non-proliferation
stories.description: US-Israeli attacks on Iran under the pretext of ending a nuclear weapons programme are damaging confidence in the NPT.

stories.title: Iran’s top diplomat visits Russia as part of efforts to end the war
stories.description: Pakistan and Oman remain involved in backchannel efforts to prevent a return to open US-Israel war on Iran.

stories.title: Iran war: What’s happening on day 59 amid diplomatic push to end conflict?
stories.description: Iran discusses diplomatic solutions with regional partners as Trump says Iran could telephone if it wants to talk.

stories.title: From Australia to Vietnam, the Iran war is fuelling demand for EVs
stories.description: Electric vehicle sales are surging in many markets as conflict drives up the cost of running petrol and diesel vehicles.

stories.title: Satellite images show scale of Israeli destruction of south Lebanon towns
stories.description: Satellite images taken reveal the Israeli military's massive scale of damage to towns in south Lebanon.

stories.title: Oil prices rise amid stalled US-Iran peace talks
stories.description: Brent crude rises more than 2 percent after Washington and Tehran fail to hold second round of talks in Pakistan.

stories.title: Iran war live: Araghchi to meet Putin; Strait of Hormuz remains shut
stories.description: Iran's foreign minister heads to Russia as Trump says Iranian leaders can call on the phone if they want to talk.

stories.title: Iran FM Araghchi says he discussed conditions for continuing US talks with ‘friends in Pakistan’
stories.description: Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi on Monday said he discussed with “friends in Pakistan” the “path and conditions” under which Tehran could continue its dialogue with Washington during his recent visit to Islamabad. After visiting Pakistan twice in two days and making a trip...

stories.title: King Charles jets to US for four-day trip amid Iran conflict, media gala shooting
stories.description: Britain’s King Charles and Queen Camilla will arrive in the United States later on Monday for a four-day trip, a tour which has taken on even greater prominence after the White House Correspondents’ dinner shooting and amid acrimony between the close allies. The state visit, by f...

stories.title: Iran war disrupts the circuit board supply chain, raises costs for tech firms
stories.description: The conflict in the Middle East has disrupted supplies of crucial raw materials and pushed up prices of the printed circuit boards (PCB) used in almost all electronic devices, from smartphones and computers to AI servers, industry sources and executives said. The disruption is a ...

stories.title: Two former Israeli PMs unite to unseat Netanyahu
stories.description: JERUSALEM: In a move aimed at unseating incumbent Benjamin Netanyahu, former Israeli prime minister Naftali Bennett and opposition leader Yair Lapid announced on Sunday they would run on a joint list in this year’s elections. “I am pleased to announce that tonight, together with ...

stories.title: PA loyalists win big in Palestinian municipal polls
stories.description: • Dominate West Bank polls, claim many seats uncontested; secure six seats in Deir al-Balah• Hamas boycotts elections; linked candidates win only two of 15 seats• Gaza turnout lags at 23pc, West Bank reaches 56pc; first election in two decades amid Israeli strikes despite truce C...

stories.title: Assault on Bangladeshi worker sparks outrage
stories.description: A video showing a Bangladeshi worker being assaulted at a factory in Incheon has sparked public outrage, prom­pting a government response and a police investigation. Authorities are looking into the case, and civic groups are calling for stronger structural measures to prevent re...

stories.title: Hezbollah leader rejects Lebanon-Israel direct talks, vows to confront Israel
stories.description: Lebanon and Israel’s U.S. ambassadors held two meetings in Washington over the past weeks, the first of their kind in decades

stories.title: Israel-Iran LIVE: Hezbollah leader rejects Lebanon-Israel direct talks, vows to confront Israel
stories.description: Meeting with Vladimir Putin will be a good opportunity to discuss war developments, says Iran FM Araghchi; Iran FM arrives in Saint Petersburg for Putin talks, says Iranian state media

stories.title: Iran proposes to reopen Strait of Hormuz without nuclear agreement
stories.description: Iran FM in Saint Petersburg blames U.S. for failure of Pakistan talks, state media said

stories.title: Iran offers to end chokehold on Strait of Hormuz, asks U.S. to end blockade
stories.description: Iran also wants the U.S. to end its blockade of the country as part of its proposal, said the two officials, who spoke on condition of anonymity to discuss the closed-door negotiations

stories.title: Iran Foreign Minister arrives in Russia as U.S. talks remain stalled
stories.description: Russian and Iranian state media confirmed Mr. Araghchi’s talks with Putin, citing officials from their respective governments

stories.title: UAE-Iran differences and India’s plans to dilute language on Israel-Palestine derail joint statement at BRICS meet
stories.description: Deeply polarised deputy FMs meeting in Delhi spell trouble for India’s BRICS Presidency; as the language of a joint statement eluded diplomats, India issued a ‘Chair’s Statement’ that reflected the subjects discussed
